---
title: "OpalElement Layout Proposal"
description: "Design report comparing historical OPAL element-placement schemes and proposing a unified OPALX layout model."
audience: developer
status: experimental
last-reviewed: "2026-07-22"
---

**Report date:** 2026-04-30  
**Kind:** Design proposal

[Download the original design report]({{< meta documents-base-url >}}/reports/2026/design/2026-04-30-opal-element-layout-proposal.pdf)

This report examines the distinct element-layout schemes inherited from
OPAL-T and OPAL-CYCL before proposing how OPALX could make the relevant layout
capabilities available consistently. It covers relative and global placement,
coordinate transforms, beamline containers, and the roles of `OpalElement`,
`Element`, and `ElementBase`.

The document is retained as an experimental design record, not as a description
of a finalized user interface. Verify implementation details against the
current source before relying on the proposed class or attribute changes.
